## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and new team member onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing strong results: 2.5x increase in clicks (945 to 2500) and 7x increase in impressions (73k to 450k) from July to October](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New team member Rebecca Miller joined as Director of Brand and Content](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Exploring "spicy" content ideas to attract backlinks and potentially drive sales partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Need to monitor backlinks and consider outreach for content/backlink partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Publishing \~60 articles/month (40 new, 20 refreshed)](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [127 articles published since August 26th](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [October performance: 2500 clicks, 450k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Weekly performance: 780 clicks, 135k impressions (510-520 from GrowthX content)](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Daily performance of new articles: 120 clicks, 15k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Top Performing Articles

  - [Luxury event planning guide](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Party planning checklist](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Party reminder messages (189 clicks in one week, \~30% of total)](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Different types of food service styles](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Conference agenda template](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

### Content Refresh Results

  - [25 existing articles updated](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Improved from 1-2 clicks to 5-10 clicks daily](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [2000 impressions daily for refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Performance Dips and Analysis

  - [20% dip in impressions for refreshed content (15k to 13k)](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [CTR drop on some articles (1% to 0.2%)](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Investigating potential causes: Google AI overviews, feature snippets](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Planning content updates, image additions, and internal linking to boost performance](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### New Initiatives

  - [Creating an internal linking document to identify related articles](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Adding keyword column to position change analysis for better context](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Exploring "spicy" content ideas (e.g., celebrity-themed articles) for social media traction and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

### Tool Access and Onboarding

  - [Rebecca to be added to Search Console (pending admin approval)](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Access provided to Notion, Airtable, and Slack for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule onboarding call with Rebecca to review Airtable and Notion processes](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Add keyword column to position change analysis in performance reports](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Begin incorporating industry, event type, and persona keywords into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Explore and brainstorm "spicy" content ideas for potential implementation](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Monitor backlinks and consider outreach for content/backlink partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Continue optimizing existing content alongside creating new articles](https://fathom.video/share/SuA4dgysQr1AKLu1ydCNRzfuyXJM3M2z?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
